caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT WITHOUT WORK." The setting appears to be a casual studio environment, with framed photographs on the wall behind him and a clothing store visible in the background, including mannequins and racks of clothes. The man is engaged in conversation, gesturing with his right hand as he speaks, indicating an animated discussion. The overall atmosphere suggests a relaxed yet professional setting for sharing insights or stories.
